Write an 11th commandment.
Tell your child you're divorcing their father.
Apply for a job as a professional mourner for people with no friends.
Convince a stranger to buy your grandmother's ashes.
Convince a stranger to buy a 'dehydrated water' kit (just add water!)
Convince your boss to write you into her will.
Tell your date that you are technically still 'on the run' from a small country.
Explain to your guest that they can't use the bathroom because your pet fish lives in the toilet bowl.
Inform your friend that they can't turn on the lights because it 'offends the house.'
Tell your mom why you have a bouncer guarding the basement.
Write a review for a hotel that charges extra for breathing the air.
Write a complaint about a gym that requires formal business while working out.
Write a how to guide on making microwave mac n cheese.
Write a resignation letter stating you are leaving to become a professional gambler.
Apologize for setting fire to your friend's plant.
Warn a stranger about the invisible bees around the corner
Create a ad for a brand of shampoo that makes your hair smell like old books.
Create a slogan for a gym that promises you will leave 'slightly more tired.'
Create a slogan for a restaurant that only serves food you can eat without teeth.
Confess to the priest that you've been using the holy water to make gourmet soup.
Confess to your cat that you ate their tuna treat.
Ask your partner to pick you up from work.
Persuade your fiance to get matching gold plated teeth instead of wedding rings.
Hypnotize a grizzly bear into thinking you are its long-lost cub.
Write your communist manifesto.
